ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer is part of */,
  "total_purchases" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* Shipping city for the order */,
  "shipping_state" TEXT /* Shipping state for the order */,
  "shipping_country" TEXT /* Shipping country for the order */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that this item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price per item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Code used for applying the discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of discount */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the discount expires */,
  "minimum_purchase" REAL /* Minimum purchase amount required for the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the employee */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was last updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date for the report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the day */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders for the day */,
  "average_discount" REAL /* Average discount applied for the day */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the day */,
  "profit" REAL /* Total profit for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who raised the ticket */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned to resolve the ticket */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution notes for the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)
